title: Aerides macrostachyon
taxonomy: Aerides macrostachyon is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Aerides macrostachyon is a type of orchid that is native to tropical Asia. This species is often found in forests and woodlands, where it can grow as an epiphyte. Aerides macrostachyon is typically classified as a terrestrial orchid, but it also has epiphytic tendencies.
